title: helianthemum virgatum subsp. maritimum
intro: Helianthemum virgatum subsp. maritimum, also known as Rockrose or Sea Sun Rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Helianthemum virgatum subsp. maritimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
